tools.name: rfix_plan_scenario
tools.description: ALWAYS call this first for any RF scenario request. Returns block schemas, composition rules, constraints, and a reference example payload. YOU must compose your own graph/project using this guidance, then call rfix_export_rfix_project. Do NOT search the filesystem for blocks or examples — this tool

tools.name: rfix_list_blocks
tools.description: Search the shipped RFIX block catalog by keyword. Use this when you need to find specific block types not already returned by rfix_plan_scenario. Queries like radar, ship, aircraft, communication, 3d, doppler, dmr, or wifi return relevant blocks with parameter schemas. Includes parameter schemas inl

tools.name: rfix_export_rfix_project
tools.description: Convert RFIX JSON input into an importable `.rfix.gz` project file. `payload` may be an RFIX backend payload, GCF prompt graph output, exported graph data, or editor/.rfix-style project JSON. Project-shaped input is preserved where possible; backend payload input is reverse-transformed into a legacy
